articles.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
articles.description: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

articles.title: Defense tech is flooded with money, but who’s built to last?
articles.description: Defense tech is red hot right now. Anduril and Mach Industries just doubled and quadrupled their valuations, respectively, and the U.S. government is proposing a 40% increase in defense budget. A wave of new startups is chasing those government contracts, but according to Ross Fubini, the venture investor who wrote Anduril’s first check, most of them will get lost in the Valley of Death between prototype contract […]

articles.title: Uber to put 500 data-collection vehicles on the road this year
articles.description: The modified Ioniq 5 will be loaded with sensors to capture data for Uber's new AV Labs division.

articles.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
articles.description: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

articles.title: Meta mercifully spun out VR fitness game Supernatural instead of just killing it
articles.description: Meta appears to have listened to the Supernatural users who protested the app's sad fate after sweeping layoffs.

articles.title: Substack’s new ‘Reply Rules’ feature lets creators control how people respond
articles.description: Substack's new Reply Rules feature is currently available for all English-language publications and is designed to give creators greater control over how their audiences respond.

articles.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
articles.description: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

articles.title: Ultrahuman says hackers accessed customers’ wellness data via internal tool
articles.description: The breach at wearable ring maker Ultrahuman stemmed from credentials stolen from a malware-infected employee laptop.

articles.title: Carvana ties up with Bezos-backed Slate Auto as it plans new car sales
articles.description: Carvana was granted a warrant to buy shares in Slate last year, according to documents obtained by TechCrunch. Guggenheim Partners CEO Mark Walter is heavily invested in both companies.

articles.title: Instagram is alerting users who were targeted by hackers during AI chatbot attacks
articles.description: Hackers appeared to take over victims’ accounts even after Meta said it fixed its AI-powered support chatbot, which granted hackers access to victims’ accounts.

articles.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
articles.description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

articles.title: Still facing copyright lawsuits, AI music generator Suno raises another $400M
articles.description: The prominent AI music-generation startup is now valued at over $5.4 billion -- about seven months ago, it raised at a $2.45 billion valuation.

articles.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
articles.description: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

articles.title: GitLab cuts 14% of staff as it scales its platform to serve AI workloads
articles.description: The company is reducing its workforce as it exits 22 countries, reduces management layers, and invests in its infrastructure to scale its platform.

articles.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
articles.description: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

articles.title: TikTok launches TikTok Pro Events, an app for cultural moments like the FIFA World Cup
articles.description: The app allows users to engage with other fans, explore trending videos, and access curated creator feeds.

articles.title: The worst hacks and breaches of 2026 (so far)
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

articles.title: Meet Wander, a StumbleUpon-inspired tool for discovering the ‘small web’
articles.description: This open source community project lets you create a StumbleUpon-like experience for recommending your favorite sites.

articles.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
articles.description: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

articles.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
articles.description: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them running reliably.

articles.title: Microsoft, Atom Computing, EeroQ update their quantum computing progress
articles.description: Some quantum computing companies we've covered have done recent progress updates.

articles.title: Possible flesh-eating screwworm infection detected in South Texas, USDA says
articles.description: If confirmed, it would be the fly's first breach of the US-Mexico border.

articles.title: Google ordered to put clearer links in AI search and let UK publishers opt out
articles.description: Google must change AI Overviews after claiming users don't want "lots of sources."

articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.description: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.

articles.title: Google's new Gemma 4 12B model is designed to run on any laptop with 16GB of RAM
articles.description: Gemma 4 12B uses a new encoding scheme and token prediction to punch above its weight.

articles.title: Trump plan to test AI models has a problem—US security teams were gutted by DOGE
articles.description: Critics say Trump plan to test AI models is short-sighted, performative.

articles.title: New social features further Plex’s evolution from media server business
articles.description: Plex is increaingly focusing on content discovery and streaming rentals.

articles.title: Autonomous vehicles were supposed to cut traffic—what if they don't?
articles.description: Data shows Waymo's robotaxis are empty for almost half of the miles they drive.

articles.title: Inside Meta's attempts to play catch-up with AI
articles.description: Doubts linger over whether Meta can close the gap with rivals.

articles.title: Beans use an immune receptor to call in airstrikes on caterpillars
articles.description: When they're being eaten, bean plants release chemicals that draw in parasitic wasps.

articles.title: How long will it take to rebuild Blue Origin's launch pad? We asked some SpaceX vets.
articles.description: "Everyone is in a place where it’s no fun to be there."

articles.title: Male bowerbirds prefer to dazzle females with bright human-made items
articles.description: "It’s a reminder of how human activity is changing the natural world in unanticipated ways.”

articles.title: Microsoft plans Linux tools and an RTX Spark desktop for Windows developers
articles.description: One hardware announcement and several software highlights from Microsoft Build.

articles.title: Microsoft's Project Solara is an Android OS designed for agents instead of apps
articles.description: Microsoft missed the boat on apps, so get ready for agents.

articles.title: Amazon-owned Ring should pay Americans for scanning their faces, lawsuit says
articles.description: Lawsuit: Ring cameras scan guests and passersby and use AI to identify faces.

articles.title: If I had a hammer... it might actually be a rhino tooth
articles.description: Neanderthals had some wild stuff in their toolkits.

articles.title: Feds failing in bid to take a supercomputer from a climate research center
articles.description: The National Center for Atmospheric Research won't be losing its supercomputer.

articles.title: Mathematicians warn of AI threats to profession as industry encroaches
articles.description: International Mathematical Union endorses warning about tech industry influence.

articles.title: Android phones will soon be able to detect spoofed calls and impersonation scams
articles.description: Google's June Android feature drop includes more scam detection, more AirDrop, and yes, more AI.

articles.title: The truth lies in the past in Silo S3 trailer
articles.description: "We do not know when it will be safe to go outside. We only know that day is not this day."

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI与云服务投资持续加码**：Alphabet为Google AI业务创纪录融资850亿美元，Lovable与Google Cloud签署多年协议以将使用量提升5倍，AI音乐生成器Suno在版权诉讼中再获4亿美元融资，GitLab为适配AI工作负载裁员14%。
2. **数据收集与AI应用拓展**：Uber计划今年部署500辆数据采集车；Google推出名为“Dreambeans”的AI工具，可将生活场景转为卡通风格；亚马逊在搜索结果中展示AI生成产品图像。
3. **平台安全与创作者控制**：Instagram正通知遭AI聊天机器人攻击的用户；Substack推出“回复规则”功能，让创作者管理用户回应；Ultrahuman因内部工具漏洞导致用户健康数据泄露。
4. **自动驾驶与汽车销售转型**：Carvana与贝佐斯支持的Slate Auto合作，计划开展新车销售业务。
5. **国防科技与AI监管**：国防科技领域资金充沛但面临可持续性挑战；新规允许出版商选择退出AI搜索内容使用。

**今日最值得关注**：Alphabet破纪录的850亿美元融资与Google Cloud的AI合作扩张，标志着科技巨头正全力押注AI基础设施，而AI音乐生成器在版权争议中仍获巨额融资，凸显AI行业对资本与监管博弈的持续依赖。

articles.description: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.

articles.description: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.

articles.description: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

articles.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
articles.description: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多模态与物理AI模型进展**：NVIDIA发布首个开放物理AI全能模型Cosmos 3，支持推理与行动；Holo3.1推出快速本地化计算机使用代理；Google展示Gemini Omni与Gemini 3.5的9个实际应用demo。
2. **模型与工具创新**：JetBrains推出12B参数专家混合模型Mellum2；OpenAI为GPT-Rosalind增加新能力；Wasmer利用Codex构建边缘Node.js运行时；PyTorch发布torch.profiler入门指南。
3. **AI应用与搜索增强**：Google搜索新增5种提升二手与复古购物体验的方式；Google I/O 2026相关发布密集，包括用Gemini构建大会、AI Studio“氛围编程”测验、Futures Lab原型展示等。
4. **智能体与逻辑推理**：强调超越LLM，企业级AI规模化采用取决于智能体逻辑；Direct Preference Optimization（DPO）技术拓展至聊天机器人之外；Reachy Mini机器人集成MCP工具。
5. **I/O 2026亮点回顾**：总结12个主要时刻，涵盖AI原型、Gemini能力更新及开发者工具。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：NVIDIA Cosmos 3作为首个开放物理AI全能模型，标志着AI从语言交互向物理世界推理与行动的实质性跨越。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国航天取得新突破**：中国连续发射多款可重复使用大型火箭（如长征十二号乙），并成功部署“千帆”卫星，首次推出与SpaceX猎鹰9号竞争的火箭型号，展现航天技术快速进步。
2. **科技与产业领域持续发力**：中国在AI芯片、智能眼镜、实验室培育钻石等高科技领域取得进展，同时推动农村移民生活便利化，显示科技与民生并重的发展路径。
3. **国际竞争与地缘博弈加剧**：美国联合欧盟组建“Pax Silica”芯片联盟限制中国AI发展，并扩大对华AI芯片出口禁令至海外中国企业；中国则通过南海资源争夺、金门战略规划等举措强化地区影响力。
4. **中美科技与产业对比引发关注**：报道对比中美科学家离奇死亡现象、中国药物研发崛起对美国制药业的挑战，以及中国脱贫致富与印度发展差异等议题，凸显全球格局变化。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国航天以“突袭式”发射完成可重复使用火箭首秀及卫星组网，标志其正加速追赶并挑战美国在商业航天与太空基建领域的主导地位。
